name: corine-agent-kit
description: The safe-by-construction agent runtime for Solana — SDK (@h4rsharma/corine-core) + CLI (@h4rsharma/corine-cli). Every trade goes through one guarded execution spine. Bring your own RPC, keys, data and LLM.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @h4rsharma/corine-core && npm run build -w @h4rsharma/corine-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @h4rsharma/corine-core && npm run typecheck -w @h4rsharma/corine-cli
